title: CBN Governor Cardoso Champions Africa’s Voice at Bretton Woods 80th Anniversary Forum - FinancialEDGE
description: The Governor of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Olayemi Cardoso, has concluded his participation in the high-level Bretton Wood sat 80 Forum, where he represented Africa’s interests on the global financial stage. The forum, organised by the International Monetary Fund (IMF) and World Bank Group (WBG), brought together as elect group of global leaders
html: The Governor of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Olayemi Cardoso, has concluded his participation in the high-level Bretton Wood sat 80 Forum, where he represented Africa’s interests on the global financial stage.
